allow: PowerShell($headers = @{ "User-Agent" = "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36" }; $css = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Gochi+Hand&display=swap" -Headers $headers -UseBasicParsing; $cssText = $css.Content; $cssText)

PowerShell($headers = @{ "User-Agent" = "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36" }; $css = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Gochi+Hand&display=swap" -Headers $headers -UseBasicParsing; $cssText = $css.Content; $cssText)
